title: Section 58
content: No clergyman in Holy Orders of the 1 *** Church of England 2 *** shall be compelled to solemnize the marriage of any-person whose former marriage has been dissolved on the ground of his or her adultery, or shall be liable to any suit, penalty or censure for solemnizing or refusing to solemnize the marriage of any such person.
footnote: 1. The word "United" rep. by Act 12 of 1873, s. 1 and the Schedule. 2. The words "and Ireland" rep. by s. 1, ibid. and the Schedule.
